info.title: Modular Ecommerce Platform API
info.description: The API Gateway for the Modular Ecommerce Platform. This gateway provides a unified entry point for Authentication, Products, and Order management services.

post.description: Authenticates user and returns JWT token.

get.description: Returns a list of authenticated user's orders.

post.description: Creates a new order for the authenticated user.

get.description: Returns details of a specific order by UUID.
Returns a paginated list of active products.

parameters.name: ids
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of product IDs (UUIDs) to filter by.

get.description: Returns details of a specific product by UUID.
Returns stock reservations for a product.

errors.description: A detailed description of each field that failed validation.
